promptSuggestions.label: Customize for IBM SDE 1
promptSuggestions.prompt: Customize my profile for the latest IBM SDE 1 opening based on what you know about me. Emphasize backend fundamentals, clean APIs, Python, SQL, React, reliability, and project proof. Keep the tone recruiter-friendly.

promptSuggestions.label: Frontend-only version
promptSuggestions.prompt: Update my skills and proof cards to focus only on frontend engineering. Prioritize React, TypeScript, UI systems, animation polish, accessibility, component architecture, and shipped interfaces.

promptSuggestions.label: Backend-specific version
promptSuggestions.prompt: Update my profile to be backend-specific. Prioritize Python, SQL, REST APIs, data models, authentication, reliability, testing, and scalable service design. Reduce visual design emphasis.

promptSuggestions.label: Make me shortlist-ready
promptSuggestions.prompt: Make this profile sharper for a graduate software engineering shortlist. Create a punchy headline, stronger proof summaries, recruiter checklist, and interview talking points.

ibm-sde1.headline: Software engineering candidate focused on reliable APIs, data-backed products, and clean full-stack execution.
ibm-sde1.roleFitSummary: Strong fit for an SDE 1 role where IBM needs candidates who can reason clearly, build reliable software, communicate trade-offs, and show proof through shipped projects rather than resume fluff.
interviewTalkingPoints: Explain how Ingen HR converts candidate evidence into structured proof signals.
Walk through API/data-model decisions in the CRM Toolkit project.
Show how React interfaces were built around recruiter workflows.
Discuss testing, edge cases, and reliability improvements.

frontend-only.headline: Frontend engineer crafting fast, premium React interfaces with clean component systems.
frontend-only.targetRole: Frontend Engineer Intern / Graduate Frontend Engineer
frontend-only.roleFitSummary: Best positioned for frontend-heavy teams that care about interaction quality, component architecture, visual polish, and translating messy product ideas into usable interfaces.

backend-only.headline: Backend-leaning software candidate focused on APIs, SQL, data models, and reliable systems.
backend-only.targetRole: Backend Engineer Intern / Graduate Software Engineer
backend-only.roleFitSummary: Backend-focused version highlights service logic, data structures, schema thinking, and reliability while keeping frontend work as supporting proof rather than the main identity.

graduate-shortlist.headline: Graduate software engineer with shipped AI product proof, strong React/Python foundations, and recruiter-ready project evidence.
graduate-shortlist.roleFitSummary: Shortlist-ready profile built around practical proof: shipped interfaces, structured engineering thinking, clear communication, and enough backend/data depth to contribute across a product team.
interviewTalkingPoints: What would be improved in production.

uploadMock.behaviour: Use URL.createObjectURL locally only. No upload API.
